required_controls.title: Leak Sensor Network
required_controls.description: Critical points must have leak sensors connected to monitoring.

required_controls.title: Automatic Shutoff Valve
required_controls.description: System should support automatic valve closure on critical leak alarm.

required_controls.title: Remote Valve Control
required_controls.description: Authorized operators can isolate affected segment remotely.

required_controls.title: Alarm Notification
required_controls.description: Escalation channel exists for operators and maintenance teams.

required_controls.title: Manual Override
required_controls.description: Field team can override automatic actions safely.

required_controls.title: Backup Power
required_controls.description: Safety controls remain available during short power outages.
